title: Logic Twin View
prompt:
Design a sophisticated split-screen workflow intelligence UI called "NEXUS Logic Twin View". 16:9 desktop app screenshot.
Left side: editable workflow graph canvas with dark grid, connected nodes, validation states, small node controls. Right side: AI-generated logic map with semantic clusters labeled Intent, Inputs, Parallel Branches, Merge, Artifacts, Risks.
Add a top segmented control: Canvas / Logic Graph / Packet Map / Rationale. Add an "Ask about this edge" contextual popover.
Style: precise enterprise AI interface, dense but calm, graphite background, green validation accents, cyan logic highlights, no marketing hero, no illustration.

Rendering requirements: Generate a crisp browser-app UI concept mockup, landscape composition, no fake browser chrome, no illegible tiny lorem ipsum, make labels readable, align panels carefully, professional product design artifact for a technical architecture report.
